values.value:
Dear {!RW_Booking__r.Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!
To proceed with the processing of your home loan sanction, we request you to kindly share the required bank loan documents within the next 3 days.
You may upload the documents directly on the Runwal app for faster processing, or connect with your Relationship Manager (RM) for any assistance.
Upload Documents on App: {!$Label.App_Link}
Timely submission of the documents will help ensure a smooth and timely sanction process.
If you need any support, please feel free to reach out to your RM.
Warm regards, Runwal Enterprises
Action Required – Submission of Home Loan Documents

Action Required – Loan Documentation
Kindly share the required bank loan documents within 3 days to proceed with sanction processing. Upload on the app or reach out to your RM.
